change_summary: Produced a read-only LLM production-aligned ranking manifest from existing replay archives without changing strategy behavior.
hypothesis: LLM soft ranking alpha remains blocked because the usable production-aligned replay sample is not available as a stable manifest; a read-only manifest of ranking-eligible replay dates can release the next default-off LLM ranking experiment without changing strategy behavior.
notes: Artifact data/experiments/exp-20260427-018/exp_20260427_018_llm_production_aligned_ranking_manifest_v2.json reports 13 replay files, 10 in-window files, 7 in-window files with archive_context, 3 in-window ranking-eligible aligned days, 8 aligned presented signals, and 3 in-window unknown-context days. This releases only a small-sample default-off LLM soft-ranking audit; it does not justify production ranking.
